items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has the power to knock out Kamaru Usman.
items.quote: I think he's knocking Kamar Usman out.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman's chin has historically been incredibly good.
Kamaru Usman's durability is a concern at age 39 moving up in weight against a power hitter.
items.quote: But at 39 up in weight against a dangerous power hitter like Drius Duplexi, we shall find out.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis's grappling defense has shown improvement.
Dricus Du Plessis possesses an awkward striking style featuring a blitz and overhand.
items.quote: The blitz, the overhand, the awkwardness
